title: Cretaing a pricelist on the sales crm
excerpt:
Hi 
is there a way to create a prodcut pricelist on the sales crm ? 
any integration tha enables it’? 
thanks 
chen

posts.author: goldman (chen goldman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

is there a way to create a prodcut pricelist on the sales crm ?
any integration tha enables it’?

thanks
chen

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Easiest way is a board that is your pricelist, and a connect boards column to allow you to select the item, then mirror the price to the item.

posts.author: goldman (chen goldman)
posts.cookedHtml:
thanks Cody!

i was so locked on finding something readymade i didnt even think that way

Chen

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
The only downside is if you change the price in the pricelist it changes it on all the items using it, which isn’t great for sales.

Column Magic, which I am involved in the development of, can copy a mirror column to a regular column. Use the change in the connect boards to trigger the copy of the mirror to a regular numbers column.

That way, the price doesn’t change on closed quotes.
